name: RootRecord
description: Machine-readable index for Solana-related discovery. RootRecord’s public Solana UX lives at solana.rootrecord.info; this file documents how the stack relates to on-chain programs and peers—not wallet addresses or keys.

transactionSemantics.notes: The canonical Solana Tools app (solana-rootrecord-site) uses @solana/web3.js paths that include VersionedTransaction for wallet signing and Raydium CPMM liquidity flows. Legacy Transaction types may still appear at compatibility boundaries. Address Lookup Tables follow whatever Raydium / invoked programs require at execution time—they are not separately marketed as a RootRecord product surface.

programsAndStandards.name: Raydium CPMM
programsAndStandards.usage: Liquidity: pool creation, add/remove liquidity in Solana Tools (user-signed; program fees on-chain).

programsAndStandards.name: SPL Token & Token-2022
programsAndStandards.usage: Token creation, transfers, and related flows in Solana Tools; Token Manager app uses client-side @solana/spl-token patterns.

programsAndStandards.name: Metaplex token metadata
programsAndStandards.usage: Metadata and listing flows where implemented in Solana Tools (see upstream repo).

aggregatorsAndApis.name: Jupiter
aggregatorsAndApis.usage: USD price hints on token dashboards, OTC/mark references on tokenomics, Jupiter Wallet adapter—Solana Tools (see solana-rootrecord-site). Not used for Weather Manager data.

rpcAndInfrastructure.name: Helius
rpcAndInfrastructure.relationship: Often used as NEXT_PUBLIC_RPC_URL (HTTPS Solana JSON-RPC) for solana.rootrecord.info deployments.

rpcAndInfrastructure.name: QuickNode
rpcAndInfrastructure.relationship: Alternative HTTPS RPC provider for the same NEXT_PUBLIC_RPC_URL pattern.

rpcAndInfrastructure.name: Pinata
rpcAndInfrastructure.relationship: Server-side IPFS pinning for Metaplex-compatible metadata uploads (PINATA_JWT); never exposed to the browser.

notUsedForWeather.name: Pyth Network
notUsedForWeather.note: RootRecord Weather Manager uses conventional weather providers and NOAA-style ingest via the primary Worker—not Pyth price/oracle feeds for forecasts.

relatedProducts.name: RootRecord Weather Manager
relatedProducts.solanaRelation: Accounts and optional earn surfaces; weather data itself is not an on-chain oracle feed.

relatedProducts.name: RootRecord Token Manager (mobile)
relatedProducts.solanaRelation: Non-custodial Phantom-style flows; SPL reads/sends from device.
